Petition To Vacate Confirmation Of The Sale Of Real Property Based Upon Successful Bidder?S Default And Failure To Complete Sale, To Authorize Resale Of The Real Property And To Allow The Estate To Retain Defaulting Bidder?S Deposit For Calculation Of Damages After Resale Of Real Property
Off Calendar Aug-08-2023 Off Calendar

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (2 Cedar St. & 66 Woodland, San Anselmo, Ca. 94960)
Off Calendar May-16-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances; Christopher Cole appearing via zoom for Lenore Gerard (Petitioner).
Matthew Goulden listing agent (Corcoran Icon Properties)
Michael Landa (Golden Land Real Estate Investment) appearing in person with Kaley Shultz (Buyer) appearing in person and Judy Newell (Buyer).

The sale was confirmed at $1,323,750.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property is under submission with the intent to grant subject to receipt of the proposed order. An additional bond in the amount of $1,100,000.00 is required.

Judge; Stephen Murphy; Clerk: Ateesh Datt; Deputy: Cristobal; Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Dec-13-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Christopher J. Cole, via Zoom, for Lenore E. Gerard, Petitioner.

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. Counsel confirms that he is unaware of any objections to this matter. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration With Will Annexed. The will dated Sep-16-2014 is admitted to probate. Lenore E. Gerard is appointed Administrator of the estate with limited authority. Bond is set at $250,000. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Jan-02-2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Nov-29-2022 Continued To Dec-13-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-02-2022 Denied
